title: Dungeons Weaponry
body: Other Mods: [Dungeons Artifacts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-dungeons-artifacts)\ [Dungeons Enchantments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeons-enchantments) Translated into Spanish (es\_ES), French (fr\_FR), Russian (ru\_RU), Chinese (zh\_CN) **Melee Weapons:** * Venom Glaive: Legendary, Poisons mobs * Frost Scythe: Legendary, Slows mobs * Frost Slayer: Legendary, Extra knockback * Firebrand: Legendary, Burns mobs * Heartstealer: Legendary, Leeches health from mobs * Dancer's Sword: Legendary * Nameless Blade: Legendary, Weakens enemy attacks * Whispering Spear: Legendary, Long reach, Throwable * Great Axeblade: Legendary, Extra knockback, Long reach * Highland Axe: Legendary, Stuns enemies * Sun's Grace: Legendary, Heals player * Stormlander: Legendary, 50% chance of lightning strike on hit * Cursed Axe: Legendary, Defeated mobs explode, Spin attack * Chill Gale Knife: Legendary, Slows mobs, Speed burst when mob is defeated * Dark Katana: Legendary, Does 50% more damage to undead * Resolute Tempest Knife: Legendary, Increased damage on successive attacks, Speed burst when mob is defeated * Fangs of Frost: Legendary, Dual wield, Slows mobs * Hammer of Gravity: Legendary, Pulls in enemies * Double Axe: Rare, Right-click to use spin attack * Backstabber: Rare, Extra damage to unsuspecting enemies * Cutlass: Common * Glaive: Common, Longer reach * Claymore: Common, Powerful pushback * Dagger: Common, Dual wield * Battlestaff: Common * Battlestaff of Terror: Legendary, Defeated mobs explode * Growing Staff: Legendary, Increased damage to wounded mobs **Bows:** * Longbow: Common, Strong charged attacks * Power Bow: Common, Strong charged attacks * Trickbow: Common, Hits multiple targets (Ricochet) * Shortbow: Common * Bonebow: Legendary, Arrows grow in size and damage * Guardian Bow: Legendary, Strong charged attacks (Supercharge II) * Red Snake: Legendary, Chance for arrows to explode * Sabrewing: Legendary, Strong charged attacks, heals players in the area * The Green Menace: Legendary, Hits multiple targets (Ricochet), Spawns poison clouds * Pink Scoundrel: Legendary, Hits multiple targets (Ricochet), Chance to enrage mobs (Wild Rage) * Love Spell Bow: Legendary, Chance to enrage mobs (Wild Rage) * Purple Storm: Legendary: Increased fire rate (Rapid Fire) **Crossbows:** * Exploding Crossbow: Rare, Explodes on impact * Azure Seeker: Legendary, Increased fire rate (Rapid Fire) * The Slicer: Legendary, Chance to fire piercing bolts (Piercing) * Firebolt Thrower: Legendary, Explodes on impact, Chance of chain reaction (Chain Reaction) * Imploding Crossbow: Legendary, Explodes on impact, Pulls in enemies (Gravity)  Blocks: - Evoker Statue: turns into evoker when disturbed, guards dungeon loot - Weaponry Table: job site for Dungeon Master villager profession - Emerald Pot Mobs: - Enchanter: spawns in Overworld - Necromancer: spawns in deserts - Vanguard: spawns in deserts - Wildfire: spawns in crimson forests, basalt deltas, and soul sand valleys - Loot Pig: does not spawn - Geomancer: spawns in deserts and mountainous regions - Nameless One: boss, found in underground desert temple structures - Mountaineer (+2 variants): spawns in mountainous biomes - Wraith: spawns in Overworld Structures: - Dungeon - Underground Desert Temple Weapons appear in loot chests in dungeons or can be bought from the Village Merchant (aka Dungeons Master in some earlier versions) **While you're here, check out ProtonMC – a free self-hostable control panel for Minecraft servers, built and maintained entirely by me. Click the image below for more details.** [![ProtonMC advertisement](https://i.imgur.com/VQwArCz.png)](https://jeremyseq.gumroad.com/l/protonmc)
